title: pyrrosia distichocarpa
intro: Pyrrosia distichocarpa, also known as the two-ranked rhododendron fern or two-ranked polypody, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia distichocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain diseases. Pyrrosia distichocarpa can be prepared as a decoction or tea, and it has also been used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
